failures: BUG [MEDIUM] Feature Flags - Collapsible activity logs: CSS does not hide/show log entries when button is clicked. The aria-expanded state toggles correctly (false→true on click), but the content remains visible regardless of state. Entries like 'Ron enabled the flag', 'Mai disabled the flag' stay visible even when aria-expanded=false. Visual collapse does not work.

ENV-BLOCKED [MEDIUM] Log Viewer - Pod list fails to load for any cluster with 'Failed to load data' error: AWS credential validation error (accessKeyId/secretAccessKey undefined). Likely backend misconfiguration - validation incorrectly requires AWS fields for kubeconfig-type clusters. Cannot test regex search highlighting or streaming.
ENV [LOW] Console errors: EventSource SSE MIME type mismatch (text/plain vs text/event-stream) and ERR_INCOMPLETE_CHUNKED_ENCODING on trpc/presence.subscribe - backend SSE configuration issue.
env_blocked_items: Log streaming/tailing (pod list fails to load)
